entry.title: New: CR 24-123 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending REFERRAL of resolutions to the Council Chair for the term beginning, January 2, 2025, relating to: (1) parking for electric vehicles; (2) initiating updates to the West Maui Community Plan in alignment with West Maui’s infrastructure plans in the aftermath of the August 2023 wildfires; and (3) providing for the establishment of the West Maui Hospital and Medical Center through the guarantee of State Special Purpose Revenue Bond issuance.

Disaster, Resilience, International Affairs, and Planning Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
